name: Nomad
description: Your early years were spent traveling with your people or alone between settlements, learning to live off the land and navigate by the stars.

feats.name: Nature's Companion
feats.description:
You gain a **Wildlife** companion that strengthens as you do. The creature's size is **small** and cannot be used as a **mount** unless mounted by a **tiny** creature. Pick one of the following **Traits** for the companion to have to determine stats.

>**Nature Companion**
> _Wildlife / Neutral_ | **Lore** _Nature_  (*small*)
> **Vitality** 8 + your **Tier** | **Defense** 11 + your **Tier**  
> **Body** 8 + your **Tier** |  **Mind** 6  | **Will** 6  
> **Attacks** 1d6 based on **Trait**  
> **AP** 3


| Trait        | Attack           | Special                                                                                                                    |
| ------------ | ---------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Tracker**  | 1d6 **Puncture** | Gain **Resolve** on **Lore** (Nature) and **Intuition** checks to track or identify wildlife.                              |
| **Prowler**  | 1d6 **Slash**    | Gain **Resolve** on **Stealth** checks; enemies have **Strain** to detect it while in dim-light or foliage.                |
| **Guardian** | 1d6 **Blunt**    | When in the same **Engagement**, you gain +1 **Armor Defense**; the companion can use **Distract** for 1 AP once per turn. |
| **Burrower** | 1d6 **Blunt**    | Ignores difficult terrain and grants you **Resolve** on finding natural hazards or hidden burrows.                         |

feats.name: Live Off The Land
feats.description: You know how to forage and collect resources. You gain **proficiency** in **Awareness** and **Outrider** tools.

feats.name: Hawk-eyes
feats.description: Creatures attempting to become **Obscured** or **Hidden** from you have **Strain** on their **Stealth Check**.
